title: galium murale
intro: Galium murale, also known as wall bedstraw, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galium murale include its ability to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Galium murale is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
